content:
MODULE: cosmos.ui.canvas
FILE: cosmos/ui/canvas.py (512 lines)
CATEGORY: ui

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Canvas Manager - Matplotlib Output for CLI and GUI.

AGI v1.8.4 Feature: Manages matplotlib canvas outputs for visualization
in both CLI (Rich terminal) and GUI (Streamlit) environments.

Features:
- Render figures to terminal (via Rich/sixel)
- Render figures to Streamlit
- Save figures to s

CLASSES:
- CanvasOutput: A rendered canvas output.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- CanvasManager: Manages matplotlib canvas outputs for CLI and GUI.

Provides unified interface f
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: def render_figure(self, fig: Figure, title: str='Canvas Output', source: str='system', session_id: O
  Methods: async def render_and_emit(self, fig: Figure, title: str='Canvas Output', source: str='system', sessi
  Methods: def render_to_terminal(self, output: CanvasOutput, width: int=80) -> str
  Methods: def render_to_streamlit(self, output: CanvasOutput) -> None
  Methods: def save_to_file(self, output: CanvasOutput, filepath: Optional[Path]=None, format: str='png') -> Pa
  Methods: def get_output(self, output_id: str) -> Optional[CanvasOutput]
  Methods: def get_recent_outputs(self, limit: int=10) -> List[CanvasOutput]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_canvas_manager(data_dir: str='./data/canvas', max_history: int=50) -> CanvasManager
- def get_canvas_manager() -> CanvasManager
- async def render_and_show(fig: Figure, title: str='Plot', source: str='system') -> CanvasOutput
- def quick_plot(data: List[float], title: str='Quick Plot', source: str='system') -> CanvasOutput
